text.description: Text to convert to speech (max 2,000 characters). Use [brackets] for steering: emotion, volume, speed, non-verbals like [laugh] or [sigh].
text.title: Text

voice_id.description: Voice ID — built-in (e.g. Sarah, Alex, Ashley, Dennis, Hana, Blake, Luna, Clive) or custom cloned/designed voice ID. 271+ built-in voices across 15 languages.
voice_id.title: Voice Id

language.description: BCP-47 language tag (e.g. 'en-US', 'fr-FR', 'ja-JP'). Auto-detected if omitted. 100+ languages supported.
language.title: Language

delivery_mode.description: Controls voice performance style. STABLE = consistent, BALANCED = natural, CREATIVE = expressive.
delivery_mode.title: Delivery Mode
